title: Knysna Police seek public’s help to find missing woman
description: GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - The police in Knysna are...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - The police in Knysna are appealing to the public for assistance in locating 42-year-old Candice Sass from Kalender Street, Hornlee, who has been reported missing.


> According to preliminary information, Sass left her home on Monday, 11 August 2025, and has not returned since. She was last seen wearing black tracksuit pants and takkies.


Anyone with information that could help trace her whereabouts is urged to contact the investigating officer, Warrant Officer James Visagie of Knysna Detectives, on 044 302 6652 or 073 244 6154.

Information can also be shared anonymously via Crime Stop on 08600 10111 or the MySAPS app.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
